channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ongoing HIV Risks for Children at Taunsa Hospital Due to Poor Practices
item.description: A serious HIV outbreak among children at Taunsa’s main public hospital has raised alarm about ongoing unsafe medical practices. Despite government interventions following the March 2025 crackdown, BBC...

item.title: How to handle a friend who constantly shares disturbing social media content
item.description: In her advice column for The Guardian, Eleanor Gordon-Smith responds to a reader who feels uneasy about a long-time friend who continually sends her disturbing social media videos and conspiracy conte...

item.title: U.S. House blocks resolution to restrict Trump’s authority to conduct military operations against Iran
item.description: The U.S. House of Representatives has rejected a resolution aimed at limiting President Donald Trump’s authority to wage war against Iran, maintaining his broad executive powers nearly six weeks into ...

item.title: High Court Freezes Moi University Accounts After Long-Standing KSh 1 Billion Debt Dispute
item.description: Moi University has suffered another major financial setback after the High Court ordered the freezing of several key accounts due to an overdue construction debt now surpassing KSh 1 billion. The debt...

item.title: Roelf Meyer Appointed as South Africa’s New Ambassador to the United States
item.description: South Africa has named Roelf Meyer, a key negotiator in the country’s transition from apartheid to democracy, as its next ambassador to the United States. Meyer, now 78, was a senior figure in the Nat...

item.title: Philippines Awaits Zaldy Co's Return, Expects Full Disclosure on Flood Control Anomalies
item.description: Following his arrest in Prague, Czech Republic, former House member Elizaldy Co is expected to disclose information regarding alleged anomalies in flood control projects, according to Ako Bicol Party-...

item.title: North Sea Drilling: Why It Won't Solve UK Energy Price Issues
item.description: Calls to increase oil and gas extraction from the North Sea are growing louder amidst rising energy prices and geopolitical tensions, particularly following recent strikes on Tehran and the subsequent...

item.title: Namibian Students Win National Global HackAtom Challenge to Represent Africa in Russia Finals
item.description: Twenty university student teams from Namibia took part in the national round of the Global HackAtom 2026 competition, a 24-hour international challenge designed to promote innovative approaches in nuc...

item.title: President Tinubu Commends Romuald Wadagni’s Peaceful Victory in Benin Republic Election
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don send congratulatory message to Romuald Wadagni after him win the Benin Republic presidential election wey happen on April 12, 2026. Wadagni, wey dey serve as Minister of Fina...

item.title: Onanuga insists Tinubu will serve full two terms in office
item.description: Bayo Onanuga, wey be Special Adviser to President Bola Tinubu on Information and Strategy, don talk say President Tinubu go finish him full eight years in office, just like how former President Muhamm...

item.title: US Defense Secretary Accused of Using Pulp Fiction Dialogue as Prayer
item.description: A significant controversy has erupted in the United States following accusations that Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth presented lines from the film *Pulp Fiction* as a biblical prayer during a Pentagon...

item.title: Ten Arrested in Claver for Illegal Diesel Theft
item.description: Ten individuals were apprehended in Claver, Surigao del Norte, for illegally pilfering fuel valued at P5.62 million. According to CIDG chief Maj. Gen. Robert Alexander Morico II, the suspects were cau...

item.title: Tenny Madis and Stefi Aludo Secure Semifinal Spots in PHILTA National Women’s Open
item.description: Filipina tennis players Tenny Madis and Stefi Aludo continued their impressive run at the 2026 PHILTA National Women’s Open after scoring crucial victories to reach the semifinals. Held under the Phil...

item.title: Wike Asks Atiku To Wait Till 2031, Denies Blocking ADC Convention Venue
item.description: The Minister of the Federal Capital Territory (FCT), Nyesom Wike, don talk say former Vice President Atiku Abubakar no get any chance to contest for the 2027 presidential election. Wike yarn this one ...

item.title: Jon Ossoff Reports Record Q1 Fundraising with $31 Million Cash on Hand
item.description: Democratic Senator Jon Ossoff from Georgia has significantly bolstered his reelection campaign with a record-breaking $14 million raised in the first quarter of 2026, bringing his total cash on hand t...

item.title: Akpabio Calls On World Legislatures To Promote Peace And Justice Through Leadership
item.description: Senate President Godswill Akpabio don call on parliaments all over the world make dem stand strong for peace, justice, and humanity, especially as wahala dey rise everywhere. He yarn this matter for t...

item.title: Temptation Island Contestant's Affair Exposed, Leading to Public Revenge
item.description: A recent episode of the reality television show 'Temptation Island' has been rocked by a shocking betrayal and subsequent public retaliation. A male contestant was caught engaging in an affair with no...

item.title: Africa50 plans major investments in Tanzania’s infrastructure to support Dira 2050 implementation
item.description: Africa50, a pan-African infrastructure investment platform established by the African Development Bank (AfDB), has expressed its readiness to invest in Tanzania’s key strategic infrastructure projects...

item.title: Relationship Challenges Plague Vincent and Claudia in ‘The Alibi’
item.description: The ABS-CBN Entertainment Studios series “The Alibi” continues to draw viewers in with its complex storyline and engaging characters. A recent article highlights ten particularly significant conflicts...

item.title: Parole granted to man convicted of murdering his wife despite undisclosed body location
item.description: Glyn Razzell, who was convicted in 2003 for the murder of his estranged wife Linda Razzell, is set to be released from prison. Linda disappeared in 2002 while on her way to work in Swindon, and her bo...
